infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: FYM uses the camera so customers can capture prescription photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: FYM uses photo library access so customers can upload existing prescription images.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: FYM uses your location to attach GPS coordinates to saved delivery addresses.
